title: The Problem Solvers | Michael Truell at Cursor
summary: Cursor is an AI-native coding platform that helps engineers and less technical builders ship quality code through agents. Founded two years prior, the company grew from 15 people to 700 employees and now serves over 60% of Fortune 500 companies.
writeup: This video profiles Cursor and its leader Michael Truell, covering the company's growth from 15 people to 700 employees in two years and its expansion to serve over 60% of Fortune 500 companies. The platform is positioned as AI-native, using agents to help both engineers and less technical builders generate and ship quality code. The takeaway is a concrete picture of how an agent-based coding tool scaled and where it landed in the enterprise market.
